hero.description: Unlock clean energy and compute yield by turning verified electricity and edge‑compute capacity into investable on‑chain assets.

whatisagv.title: What We Do
whatisagv.description: AGV NEXRUR is a dePIN RWA infrastructure protocol that transforms orchards, solar farms and edge-compute clusters into verifiable, yield‑backed digital assets. Every unit of energy and compute output is monitored by IoT devices, anchored on-chain, and only then tokenized. This Power-to-Mint mechanism ensures a 1:1 link between physical productivity and digital value, unlocking sustainable returns for on-chain investors. AGV currently anchors yield to verified orchards, solar plants and compute nodes in Shaanxi, China—the world's largest energy and AI infrastructure zone

whyagv.title: Why AGV Is a Blueprint for Real Yield Infrastructure?
whyagv.description: AGV is not a one-off project. It's a replicable protocol turning real land into digital yield infrastructure. Every AGV unit is expected to generate $180k–$280k in annual revenue, with an IRR between 18% and 26%, based on actual orchard yields and regional solar performance data.

fixing.title: Fixing What's Broken in Real-World Tokenization
fixing.description1: AGV bridges the digital and physical worlds by turning orchards and solar farms into NFTs and tokens. Each asset is linked to smart contracts that automate income sharing, ownership, and governance — solving issues like fragmented data, unverifiable yields, and opaque land rights.
fixing.description2: At its core, AGV uses a standardized asset unit: 100 mu of high-yield apple orchards paired with 6MW of solar. This model delivers $180k–$280k annual income per unit with 18%–26% IRR, backed by IoT-based performance data and predictive models.
fixing.description3: Unlike traditional agri-projects that are hard to replicate, AGV units are SPV-packaged, DeFi-compatible, and globally modular — enabling fast deployment and repeatable scaling across borders.

exploreagv.title: Explore AGV's On-Chain Infrastructure
exploreagv.description: Come visit our real-world project sites and see how orchards, solar arrays, and blockchain come together. From China's green zones to future international hubs, AGV is building the future of land-based RWA on-chain.

blockchain.title: Revolutionizing Infrastructure with Blockchain
blockchain.assetsDescription: Assets are land-based, yield-producing, and inflation-resistant — not synthetic tokens or speculative DeFi experiments.
blockchain.onChainItem1: IoT sensors for real-time yield and energy data
blockchain.onChainItem4: Token emission linked to verified output
blockchain.onChainDataDesc2: Users can monitor growth, power generation, and token accrual — all transparently recorded and accessible on-chain.
blockchain.builtToScaleDesc: Each AGV unit is standardized and tokenized via SPV:
blockchain.builtItem1: Expandable with battery storage & edge compute
blockchain.builtItem2: Modular design supports irrigation, AI nodes, or carbon tracking
blockchain.builtItem3: Applicable across Asia, LATAM, Africa, and MENA
blockchain.builtToScaleDesc2: CEX-ready, DeFi-compatible, and ESG-aligned — AGV is built for global integration.

assetBackedNFT.title: Asset-Backed NFT
assetBackedNFT.description: SeedPass, TreePass, SolarPass and ComputePass represent fractional ownership in orchards, solar units and compute capacity. Holders earn real-world yield from their pro-rata share of output.

powerToMint.title: Power-to-Mint
powerToMint.description: Tokens are minted only after IoT verification of electricity and compute, ensuring real‑world backing and preventing inflation.

dualTokenSystem.title: Dual-Token System
dualTokenSystem.description: GVT (Green Value Token) is minted from verified yield; rGGP (Reward Token) incentivizes adoption and can be converted into GVT. Airdrops and distributions are merit‑based community rewards, not guaranteed returns.

daoCompliance.title: DAO & Compliance
daoCompliance.description: AGV operates via a cross-border DAO with multi-sig and score-to-vote governance.

realAssets.title: Real Assets
realAssets.description: AGV’s underlying orchards, solar capacity and edge compute clusters provide tangible, measurable yield.

tokenization.title: Tokenization
tokenization.description: Output data is measured by IoT devices and committed on‑chain; only then can tokens be minted (Power‑to‑Mint), ensuring a trustless 1:1 relationship.

yieldDistribution.title: Yield Distribution
yieldDistribution.description: Investors receive yield from orchards, solar and compute according to their NFT holdings. Target blended IRR is 18-26%, outperforming many traditional renewable funds.

scalableSustainability.title: Scalable Sustainability
scalableSustainability.description: Distributed mini‑grid architecture scales across Asia/MENA, reducing grid strain, lowering latency for AI workloads and advancing sustainability goals. Each new asset unit increases both yield and valuation.

solarPlantOnline.title: Solar Plant Online
solarPlantOnline.description: The first 6 MWp CdTe PV plant has been commissioned and connected to the local grid.

ppaInProgress.title: PPA in Progress
ppaInProgress.description: Long‑term Power Purchase Agreements are being finalized with regional grid operators; draft contracts have been reviewed.

computeNodeRunning.title: Compute Node Running
computeNodeRunning.description: The initial 1.5 MW edge compute cluster is installed and actively processing pilot workloads; IoT telemetry is already recording on‑chain.

testimonials.title1: The Future of Infrastructure Is Real, Green, and On-Chain
testimonials.description: Top institutions agree: real-world assets, sustainable energy, and blockchain integration are shaping the next trillion-dollar opportunity. AGV is positioned at the intersection of these macro trends.
testimonials.quote1: Tokenization of real-world assets could unlock a $10T market by 2030.
testimonials.quote2: ESG and energy-linked infrastructure are set to dominate institutional flows over the next decade.
testimonials.quote3: Distributed green energy is the foundation of long-term economic resilience.
testimonials.title2: The Future Is Powered by Land, Sun, and Code

aboutTokens.title: About GVT & rGGP
aboutTokens.description: The AGV NEXRUR operates on a dual-token system designed to separate governance and reward mechanisms. GVT serves as the governance token while rGGP functions as the reward token for ecosystem participation.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We steward resources for the long term. From orchards to solar and compute, we align incentives so on-chain growth reflects real-world productivity and environmental responsibility.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: We build with partners and communities. Farmers, energy operators, node providers, regulators, and users work with us through open standards, transparent data, and fair rewards.

innovation.title: Innovation

mission.title: MISSION
mission.description: Our mission is to make electricity and compute investable for everyone by turning verified real-world output into transparent, on-chain assets.

story.title: OUR STORY
story.description: In an AI-powered era, electricity and compute demand is growing exponentially. AGV NEXRUR addresses this by pairing orchards, solar farms, and edge compute mini-grids with IoT telemetry and on-chain verification to create sustainable, yield-backed tokens. Our initial assets are in Shaanxi, China, with expansion plans across Asia and beyond.

cleanEnergy.title: Clean Energy Assets
cleanEnergy.description: 6 MWp CdTe PV plant (first batch) with projected annual output of 7.3 GWh. Additional solar units are under development.

orchards.title: Productive Orchards
orchards.description: ~100 000 kg apples per 100 mu per year, integrated into NFT revenue streams and monitored via IoT sensors.

compute.title: Edge Compute Mini-Grids
compute.description: Initial 1.5 MW cluster (~1 PFLOPS) delivering ~1.31 GWh/year of compute load to AI workloads; additional nodes are scheduled for deployment.

verification.title: IoT Verification & On-Chain Attestation
verification.description: Every watt of electricity and cycle of compute is verified and anchored on-chain before tokens are minted (Power-to-Mint). This ensures accountability and transparency.

acquire.title: Acquire & Integrate
acquire.description: AGV acquires or partners with orchards, solar farms and compute clusters, installing IoT sensors and secure telemetry.

verify.title: Verify
verify.description: Energy and compute output data is collected in real-time, validated by auditors and anchored on-chain.

mint.title: Mint
mint.description: Tokens are minted only after output is verified. GVT is minted from verified yield; rGGP is distributed as a merit-based incentive and can be converted to GVT. Investors see exactly how much real-world output backs each token.

cta.title: Join us in building a sustainable, tokenized future.
